text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While I'm walking around the<n>academy on my
lunch break...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So sleepy... Training ran late again<n>yesterday, so I
shouldn't be<n>surprised.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: UWAAAAGH! Cheer up, Taishiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The hell?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, hey! Taishin! Have youheard about the musical AnimalKingdom?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's a musical! You know, those<n>singing plays!
Anyway, wanna star in<n>one with us?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, no... Why are you even asking?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Musicals are excellent for training the<n>body. We
could start right now if you<n>wish.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're in on this too, Hayahide? Is<n>this a joke?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A fun way to exercise, eh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're always training by<n>yourself at night,
right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that kinda lonely and boring? I<n>bet it'd be
super fun to do a musical<n>together!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Musicals require a variety of skills in<n>the
performing arts, such as singing,<n>dancing, and
acting.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's a fantastic full-body workout and<n>also serves
as practice for<n>concerts—a wonderful form of
exercise, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Nah. Sorry, I'm out. That's not really<n>my thing, so
you two go ahead and<n>do whatever.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, very well. Then shall we give<n>you a little
teaser first?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Don't take your eyes off us!<n>Let's do this,
Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: HIT THE MUSIC!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wait... You're doing this now?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket and Biwa Hayahide<n>start dancing...
and dancing...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pfft! What the heck is this?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide and her stern face in a<n>musical?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh... Haha! You've got to be kidding<n>me! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ahhhhh! Taishin's LAUGHING!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Good! We pulled it off, Ticket! Mission<n>complete!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: M-mission? What are you talking<n>about?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Oh, Taishin! We know<n>you've been really
exhausted lately!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So me and Hayahide were thinking of<n>ways to
cheer you up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So how was that? Pretty entertaining,<n>huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hang on a second. So you're saying<n>that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The whole musical bit was all just a<n>ploy?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
More or less. But I'm relieved to see<n>you smiling
as a result.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm! You had the hugest grin!Seeing you smile like that makes meso happy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! You tricked me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, I filmed all of<n>that—including
Hayahide's<n>emotionless jig!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Might be good to get your sister in on<n>the fun... I
wonder how she'd react?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me?! Wait! Brian cannotsee that!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yay! You two are having so<n>much fun now!
♪
